welcomeModal.title: Welcome to
welcomeModal.subtitle_1: Please select your preferred language and theme

hero.title: Meet
hero.tagline: Your voice assistant for trauma support, growth, and gentle healing.
hero.description: Naya isn't just an AI. It's a calm presence that listens deeply, helping you reconnect with yourself and navigate your thoughts at your own pace.

header.title: About
header.subtitle: We are building the future of emotional safety, one conversation at a time.

mission.title: Creating a <1>Safe Space</1> for every voice.
mission.desc: Our mission is to bridge the gap between technology and human empathy. Naya isn't just an assistant; it's a supportive companion built on the principles of trauma-informed care and emotional safety. We believe that everyone deserves to be heard without judgment, whenever they need it.

journey.title: Why Naya <1>was Created</1>.
journey.desc: Naya was born from the realization that millions struggle silently with emotional burdens, often feeling overwhelmed or unable to reach out. We saw a need for a gentle, digital first step—a way to release tension and process thoughts in a space that feels both personal and private.

wellbeing.title: Mental Health <1>Matters</1>.
wellbeing.desc: Healing isn't a straight line, and it shouldn't be lonely. Stress, anxiety, and trauma are parts of the human experience that require patience and care. Naya serves as a reminder that your feelings are valid, and that taking the time to speak your truth is a powerful step toward recovery and awareness.

trust.quote: Designed with care, privacy, and <1>emotional safety</1> at its core.

hero.title: How <1>Naya</1> Works
hero.subtitle: A simple, natural conversation designed to support you step by step. No complexity, just care.

s1.title: Speak
s1.desc: Open the app and share what's on your mind. Just talk as if to a friend.

s2.title: Understand
s2.desc: Our trauma-informed AI listens and interprets with deep emotional awareness.

s3.title: Respond
s3.desc: Receive thoughtful, safe, and supportive guidance tailored to your moment.

s4.title: Grow
s4.desc: Feel calmer, heard, and better equipped to handle your thoughts.

experience.title: Say
experience.subtitle: No typing, no complexity. Just your voice, your thoughts, and a safe space that always listens.

values.note: Safety & Emotional Privacy at our Core

hero.title: Sources & <1>Resources</1>
hero.subtitle: Explore the science, research, and literature that shapes Naya's trauma-informed approach.

cta.title: Start your <1>journey</1> today.
cta.subtitle: Available now on all your favorite devices.

footer.mission_desc: Providing a safe, trauma-informed space for emotional processing and healing through gentle AI guidance.
footer.newsletter_desc: Join our journey toward emotional well-being.
